rankings.reason: Best narrative quality; perfectly captures the futuristic, immersive, and high-tech vision requested by the design team.
Strong focus on functional AI and robotics, though the narrative lacks the creative flair of Option C.
Provides a clear, efficient vision but relies on generic descriptions rather than a compelling, immersive story.
Focuses too heavily on a single gimmick rather than the comprehensive, high-tech airport experience requested.
